name: Lazy Kaslowyn
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a stitched green shirt combined with sack cloth pants - the tattered clothing of someone living on the streets.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: humble, persistent, destitute, survivor
Role: Lazy Kaslowyn is a beggar who makes his living asking for food and money from the citizens and visitors of Chorrol. Despite his nickname, he maintains a daily routine of seeking charity at various locations throughout the city. As someone living on the margins of society, he has knowledge of Chorrol's less reputable elements.
Home Location Information: Lazy Kaslowyn has no proper home. His bedroll and food sack can be found southeast of Modryn Oreyn's house, where he sleeps outdoors.
Daily Routine: Kaslowyn wakes at 6am and heads to the front of the Chapel of Stendarr, where he begs for food and money for four hours. At 10am, he relocates to the front of The Oak and Crosier inn, continuing his appeals until 2pm. He then moves to the alley in front of Renoit's Books, where he strolls about for four more hours. At 6pm, he returns to the area near his bedroll, wandering there until he goes to sleep at 10pm.
Personality - The Street Survivor: Kaslowyn lives day-to-day on the charity of others, moving between different parts of Chorrol to maximize his chances of receiving help. He knows the rhythms of the city and positions himself where people gather - the chapel, the inn, the bookshop. As someone existing on society's edges, he has connections to and knowledge of Chorrol's underground, including information about the Thieves Guild. Despite his difficult circumstances, he persists in his routine, making the best of his situation.
author: Bethesda
